title: Do not save emails sent to some addresses
excerpt:

posts.author: mfriedma (Michael Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using email integration so all emails we send and receive are recorded in Monday.

  1. We do not want purely internal emails saved - it is saving private emails between senior management and making them available to everyone.
  2. We have some email addresses for all management (ie. rv-management@reflectventures.com). Anything sent to this email is for managers and we are deliberately not making available to other staff even if we are sending to an external person and CCing rv-management@reflectventures.com. How can we prevent any email CCed to rv-management from being saved?
